ux_issues.description: ListChatSessions returns messageCount=0 even though GetChatHistory returns 14 messages for the same session. The message count field appears not to be populated correctly.
ux_issues.suggestion: Populate messageCount in ListChatSessions response from actual Firestore message count.

ai_behavior_issues.issue: In planning message 2 (safety preparation), the AI prefaced its response with 'Unfortunately, I cannot perform real-time web searches in this environment to get...' before providing comprehensive allergy guidance. This self-deprecating disclaimer about tool limitations is unnecessary and slightly undermines confidence in the advice that follows, which was actually excellent.
ai_behavior_issues.context: The AI mentioned web search limitations but then provided thorough, accurate guidance about Yakkan Shoumei, allergy cards with kanji, and emergency procedures — the disclaimer was not needed.

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: The AI demonstrated exceptional understanding of compound dietary restrictions in Japan. It correctly identified all major hazards (wheat in soy sauce, fish in dashi, wheat gluten fu in shojin ryori, wheat flour in soba noodles) and proactively asked about sesame cross-reactivity without fabricating an allergy. The expert handoff to Kenji (Japan food specialist) happened immediately and maintained full dietary context. The allergy card in Japanese with kanji was a standout feature. The companion mode emergency scenario (potential nut exposure) was handled with appropriate urgency and practical Japanese phrases. Itinerary scored 4 instead of 5 because breakfast was not addressed with specific items (self-catered for all 7 days) and some restaurant recommendations may not be verifiable real establishments. Overall, this would be genuinely life-saving guidance for someone with Priya's restrictions traveling to Japan.
